title: Namibia Return of Income: Individual (Form 6-0/0014C/1)
description: The Namibia Revenue Agency's (NamRA) "Return of Income: Individual" (Form 6-0/0014C/1), the annual domestic-tax return an individual taxpayer must render on or before 30 June of each year, per the form's own printed instruction. Opens Namibia as a new jurisdiction (GOV-4491, child of GOV-4488 "GovSchema Standard Research", following GOV-4424's original scouting pass and GOV-4488's re-verification of the live source immediately before this authoring cycle). This is the simplified edition of the individual return, restricted by the form's own printed Note 6 to taxpayers with at most one employer/retirement fund and no farming or other business income during the year of assessment — taxpayers with more than one employer, partial-year employment, deductible expenses against remuneration, or farming/business activity are directed by the same note to complete Form 6-0/0014B or 6-0/0014A instead, which this schema does not model. This schema models Schedule 1 (Personal Particulars, contact details, banking details, and the signed declaration), the prior-year-filing and Namibia-residency-transition questions, Schedule 2 (a 6-slot bounded table of dependent children/stepchildren), Schedule 3 (salary/wages/pension income, its two same-schedule deduction items with attached fund names, and the housing/company-vehicle disclosure questions), and the Employees' Tax Deducted table (a 3-slot bounded table of PAYE 5 certificate numbers and amounts). Every printed line that is purely a same-form arithmetic total of other same-form lines (the Schedule 3 Sub-Total, Total Deductions, and Net Salary lines, and the Employees' Tax Deducted table's own Sum of Employees' Tax Credits line) is excluded from `fields[]`, per this registry's standing closed decision to defer calculated/derived fields (GSP-0013 §7, founder-confirmed on GOV-302) — see this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full list of excluded lines and disclosed findings. This schema does not file the return itself; the live source is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Namibia or the Namibia Revenue Agency.

verification.notes: See VERIFICATION.md for the full write-up: source re-fetch/hash, extraction method, document structure, scope decisions, and disclosed findings, including a material file-size change flagged before authoring by GOV-4491's own delegating issue.

steps.title: Tax Year and Office of Registration
Schedule 2: Own Children or Stepchildren Supported
Schedule 3: Salary, Wages, Pension and Annuities
Schedule 3: Housing and Company Vehicle Disclosure

fields.name: taxYear
fields.label: Tax Year
fields.description: The year of assessment this return covers.

fields.name: registrationOffice
fields.label: Office of Registration
fields.description: The NamRA office at which the taxpayer is registered.

fields.name: taxFileIdentificationNumber
fields.label: File Identification Number
fields.description: The taxpayer's own file identification number, which the source's own instruction says must always be mentioned in correspondence and at interviews.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, header — "ALWAYS MENTION THIS FILE IDENTIFICATION NUMBER IN YOUR CORRESPONDENCE AND AT INTERVIEWS"

fields.name: postalAddress
fields.label: Postal Address
fields.description: The taxpayer's postal address, printed as a single multi-line block.

fields.name: residentialAddress
fields.label: Residential Address
fields.description: The taxpayer's residential address, printed as a single multi-line block.

fields.name: returnOffice
fields.label: Return Office
fields.description: The NamRA regional office this return is being submitted to.

fields.name: spouseTaxFileIdentificationNumber
fields.label: Spouse's Income Tax File Identification No.
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 1 — "SPOUSE'S INCOME TAX FILE IDENTIFICATION NO."

fields.name: bankName
fields.label: Name of Bank
fields.description: The source's own instruction notes banking details are requested because refunds are transferred electronically to the taxpayer's bank account.

fields.name: accountType
fields.label: Type of Account
fields.description: Mark one of the three printed account-type boxes.
fields.sourceRef: "TAXPAYER'S BANKING DETAILS" — "TYPE OF ACCOUNT" (SAVINGS / CURRENT / TRANSMISSION)

fields.name: renderedReturnLastYear
fields.label: Did You Render a Return of Income for Last Year?
fields.sourceRef: Page 2 — "DID YOU RENDER A RETURN OF INCOME FOR LAST YEAR?"

fields.name: priorYearReturnOffice
fields.label: To Which Office?
fields.description: The NamRA office to which last year's return of income was rendered.

fields.name: priorYearIncome
fields.label: What Was Your Income for Last Year?
fields.description: Printed only for a taxpayer who did not render a return of income last year, in Namibia Dollars.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2 — "WHAT WAS YOUR INCOME FOR LAST YEAR? N$"

fields.name: dateOfArrival
fields.label: Date of Arrival
fields.description: Only applicable if the taxpayer was previously resident outside Namibia and arrived (or returned) during the year of assessment.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2 — "IF PREVIOUSLY RESIDENT OUTSIDE NAMIBIA" / "DATE OF ARRIVAL"

fields.name: dateOfDeparture
fields.label: Date of Departure
fields.description: Only applicable if the taxpayer has left Namibia during the year of assessment.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2 — "IF YOU HAVE LEFT NAMIBIA" / "DATE OF DEPARTURE"

fields.name: child1Name
fields.label: Child/Stepchild 1: Name and Surname
fields.description: Schedule 2's printed table has exactly 6 numbered rows (1-6); flattened here to child1..child6, per this registry's bounded-repeating-group convention. Not required: a taxpayer with no children, or fewer than 6, leaves the remaining rows blank. Each row is for an own child or stepchild who, on the last day of the year of assessment, was unmarried, not over the age of 26, and not liable for the payment of Income Tax during the year, per Schedule 2's own printed (a)-(c) conditions.
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 2, row 1 — "Names and surname of each child or stepchild"

fields.name: child2Name
fields.label: Child/Stepchild 2: Name and Surname
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 2, row 2 — "Names and surname of each child or stepchild"

fields.name: child3Name
fields.label: Child/Stepchild 3: Name and Surname
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 2, row 3 — "Names and surname of each child or stepchild"

fields.name: child4Name
fields.label: Child/Stepchild 4: Name and Surname
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 2, row 4 — "Names and surname of each child or stepchild"

fields.name: child5Name
fields.label: Child/Stepchild 5: Name and Surname
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 2, row 5 — "Names and surname of each child or stepchild"

fields.name: child6Name
fields.label: Child/Stepchild 6: Name and Surname
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 2, row 6 — "Names and surname of each child or stepchild"

fields.name: employerRevenueCode
fields.label: Revenue Code
fields.description: The Revenue Code identifying the trade or profession of the taxpayer's employer and/or retirement fund, per the form's own printed Revenue Codes list. Schedule 3 in its entirety is only applicable to a taxpayer with salary, wages, pension, or annuity income during the year, consistent with this registry's established convention for optional income-statement lines.
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 3 — "Please indicate the Revenue code in which trade or profession your employer and/or retirement fund falls (see list above)"

fields.name: employerOrFundName
fields.label: Name of Employer or Retirement Fund
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 3, Line No. 1 — "Name of Employer or Retirement Fund"

fields.name: employmentPeriod
fields.label: Period (full year only)
fields.description: Per this form's own Note 6, this simplified edition only covers a taxpayer employed for the full year of assessment; a taxpayer employed for only part of the year is directed to Form 6-0/0014B or 6-0/0014A instead.

fields.name: grossAmount
fields.label: Gross Amount (N$ Only)
fields.description: Whole Namibia Dollars only, per the column's own printed "(N$ ONLY)" heading.

fields.name: pensionProvidentFundContribution
fields.label: Less 1: Current Contributions to Approved Pension/Provident Fund
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 3, item 1 — "Current contributions to approved Pension/Provident Fund"

fields.name: retirementAnnuityFundContribution
fields.label: Less 2: Current Contributions to Approved Retirement Annuity Funds
fields.description: Per the form's own Note 5, when this contribution is claimed as a deduction the fund administrator's certificate must be attached unless already shown on the taxpayer's PAYE 5 Certificate.
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 3, item 2 — "Current contributions to approved Retirement Annuity Funds (see note 5)"

fields.name: retirementAnnuityFundName1
fields.label: Name of Fund(s) (Retirement Annuity) — 1
fields.description: The printed "Name of Fund(s)" caption has exactly 2 blank lines; flattened here to retirementAnnuityFundName1/2, per this registry's bounded-repeating-group convention.

fields.name: childEducationInsurancePremium
fields.label: Less 3: Current Premiums Paid Under Policies of Insurance for the Education or Training of a Child
fields.description: Per the form's own Note 5, when this premium is claimed as a deduction the policy insurer's certificate must be attached unless already shown on the taxpayer's PAYE 5 Certificate.
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 3, item 3 — "Current premiums paid under policies of insurance for the education or training of a child (see note 5)"

fields.name: ownsResidence
fields.label: Are You the Owner of the House You Are Residing In?
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 3(a) — "Are you the owner of the house you are residing in?"

fields.name: rentalPaidToOwner
fields.label: Amount of Rental Paid to the Owner
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 3(a)(ii) — "Amount of rental paid to the owner"

fields.name: ownerIsEmployer
fields.label: Whether the Owner of the Property Is Also Your Employer
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 3(a)(iii) — "Whether the owner of the property is also your employer"

fields.name: ownsCompanyVehicle
fields.label: Are You in Possession of a Company Vehicle?
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 3(b) — "Are you in possession of a company vehicle?"

fields.name: vehicleConditionsOfUse
fields.label: Conditions of Use
fields.description: E.g. limitation regarding costs paid by employer or limitations regarding kilometres travelled for private purposes, per the form's own printed example.
fields.sourceRef: Schedule 3(b)(iii) — "Conditions of use (e.g. limitation regarding costs paid by employer or limitations regarding kilometres travelled for private purposes)"

fields.name: payeCertificateNumber1
fields.label: PAYE 5 Certificate Number 1
fields.description: The printed "Employees' Tax Deducted" table has exactly 3 blank rows; flattened here to payeCertificateNumber1..3 / employeesTaxDeducted1..3, per this registry's bounded-repeating-group convention.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4 — "EMPLOYEES' TAX DEDUCTED" / "PAYE 5 CERTIFICATE NUMBERS", row 1

fields.name: payeCertificateNumber2
fields.label: PAYE 5 Certificate Number 2
fields.sourceRef: Page 4 — "EMPLOYEES' TAX DEDUCTED" / "PAYE 5 CERTIFICATE NUMBERS", row 2

fields.name: payeCertificateNumber3
fields.label: PAYE 5 Certificate Number 3
fields.sourceRef: Page 4 — "EMPLOYEES' TAX DEDUCTED" / "PAYE 5 CERTIFICATE NUMBERS", row 3

documents.label: PAYE 5 and/or PAYE 5(A) employee's tax certificate(s)
documents.handling: Applicable to a taxpayer completing Schedule 3 (salary/wages/pension income). Left plain-optional rather than requiredWhen-gated on a Schedule 3 field, per this registry's documented notEquals-against-an-absent-optional-field bug class.
documents.sourceRef: Schedule 3 heading — "ATTACH YOUR EMPLOYEE'S TAX CERTIFICATES PAYE 5 AND/OR PAYE 5(A)."

documents.label: Retirement annuity fund / child education insurance premium certificate
documents.handling: Per the form's own Note 5, required when claiming a Retirement Annuity Fund contribution or a child education/training insurance premium as a deduction, unless the amount is already shown on the taxpayer's PAYE 5 Certificate.
documents.sourceRef: Page 2, Important Notes and Instructions, Note 5

documents.label: Declaration of accuracy
documents.statement: I DECLARE THAT THE INFORMATION FURNISHED IN THIS RETURN IS TRUE AND CORRECT.
